phrases.text_local: Kde je vstup do Barokního divadla?
phrases.cultural_note: The Baroque theater is inside the castle complex, which uses a courtyard numbering system.

likely_response.translation_en: Fifth courtyard, to the right of the fountain.

responses.english: Fifth courtyard, to the right of the fountain.

phrases.text_local: Je dnes vstup do muzea zdarma?
phrases.cultural_note: Museums in Český Krumlov rarely have free days, though some offer discounts with a Český Krumlov Card.
Many cafés in Latrán have terraces overlooking the Vltava River.

likely_response.translation_en: Just around the corner, by the river.

responses.english: Just around the corner, by the river.

phrases.intent_en: How do I get to Eggenberg brewery?
phrases.text_local: Jak se dostanu do Eggenberského pivovaru?
phrases.cultural_note: The brewery is located a short walk from Latrán, across the Vltava river bend.

likely_response.local: Přejděte most, pak doleva podél řeky.
likely_response.translation_en: Cross the bridge, then left along the river.

responses.english: Cross the bridge, then left along the river.
responses.french: Přejděte most, pak doleva podél řeky.

phrases.intent_en: How do I pay for guided tour?
phrases.text_local: Jak mám zaplatit za prohlídku s průvodcem?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment for castle tours is always handled at the central ticket office, not to the guide directly.

likely_response.local: V pokladně před prohlídkou, kartou i hotově.
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office before the tour, by card or cash.

responses.english: At the ticket office before the tour, by card or cash.
responses.french: V pokladně před prohlídkou, kartou i hotově.
